name: example-html-ppt-product-launch
title: Html Ppt Product Launch
description: Launch keynote deck — dark hero + light content, warm orange→peach accent, feature cards, pricing tiers, CTA. Use when announcing a product, launching a feature, or doing a keynote-style reveal.

query.en: Make a product-launch keynote deck in HTML using the html-ppt-product-launch full-deck template (dark hero, warm orange accent, feature cards, pricing tiers). Confirm: product name + tagline, the 3 key features, and pricing tiers — then write the deck.
query.zh-CN: 使用这个插件完成以下任务：Make a product-launch keynote deck in HTML using the html-ppt-product-launch full-deck template (dark hero, warm orange accent, feature cards, pricing tiers). Confirm: product name + tagline, the 3 key features, and pricing tiers — then write the deck.
